source.title: Source
source.description: Choose CarDekho, CarTrade, or both sources.

cities.title: Cities
cities.description: Indian cities to search. Examples: Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune.

models.title: Car models
models.description: Car make/model searches. Examples: Honda City, Maruti Swift, Toyota Fortuner. Use All Cars for broad city listings.

minPrice.title: Minimum price
minPrice.description: Optional minimum used-car price in INR.

maxPrice.title: Maximum price
maxPrice.description: Optional maximum used-car price in INR.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of unique used-car listings to save. Supports up to 500 records per run.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify Proxy settings. Direct requests usually work; proxies can improve reliability for larger runs.
